response:
This email proposes a new $29/month 'Starter' pricing tier that would sit between the existing Free tier and $79/month Pro tier, with internal analysis finding 40% of churned users left the service due to pricing concerns.
The proposed Starter tier would include 5 user seats, 10K API calls, and email support, and is projected to recover 15% of price-related churned users to generate an additional $180K in annual recurring revenue.
